name: USS PC-495 (PC-495)
events: 15 Jul 1942 USS PC 495 picks up 6 survivors from the Norwegian merchant Moldanger. The Moldanger was torpedoed and sunk on 27 June 1942 in position 38°03'N, 70°52'W by German U-boat U-404.

8 Jul 1943 USS PC-495 picks up 66 survivors from the American merchant Eldena that was torpedoed and sunk by German U-boat U-510 about 150 nautical miles north-east of Cayenne, French Guyana in position 05°50'N, 50°20'W.
